top_findings: Link verification inconclusive for 11 URLs (auth/rate-limit/server block); these are excluded from broken-link counts.
Freshness visibility is weak: only 1.91% pages show last updated

analysis.executive_summary: Audit covered 9,087 pages from Confluent documentation (14.7% of 61,827 requested pages, capped at 10,000). No broken internal or repository navigation links detected across crawled sample. API reference coverage is 75.86% across 2,610 detected API pages. Freshness metadata present on only 1.91% of pages, creating significant visibility gap. Overall audit confidence is 50.7%, with link verification at 25% confidence due to 11 unverified URLs blocked by auth/rate-limits.
strengths: Zero broken internal documentation links detected across 9,087 crawled pages
Zero broken repository navigation links (GitHub/GitLab) found
Strong API reference coverage at 75.86% with 2,610 API pages successfully detected
Example code reliability estimate at 100% across sampled content
SEO/geo issue rate low at 4.85% of crawled pages
risks: Crawl captured only 14.7% of requested pages (9,087 of 61,827), leaving 85.3% of site unaudited
Overall audit confidence critically low at 50.7%, limiting reliability of findings
Link verification confidence at 25% due to 11 URLs blocked by authentication or rate-limiting
Freshness metadata visible on only 1.91% of pages, preventing age/staleness assessment for 98% of content
24.14% of API reference content lacks coverage, creating potential gaps in developer documentation
1,656 links excluded from analysis, reducing visibility into external dependency health
Multi-project topology may hide cross-project documentation inconsistencies

prioritized_actions.action: Implement last-updated timestamps on all documentation pages to enable freshness tracking (currently 1.91% coverage)
Investigate and resolve 11 unverified links blocked by auth/rate-limits to achieve full link validation
Increase crawl budget or prioritize high-traffic pages to audit beyond 14.7% coverage of total site
Close 24.14% API reference coverage gap by documenting missing endpoints/methods across 2,610 API pages
Review and document rationale for 1,656 excluded links to ensure no critical external dependencies are ignored

limitations: Audit sampled 14.7% of site due to crawl limits; findings may not represent unaudited 85.3% of content
Cannot verify content accuracy, technical correctness, or whether documentation matches actual product behavior
External link health depends on third-party availability at audit time; transient failures may be misreported
Multi-project topology may obscure cross-repository inconsistencies or duplicated content not visible in single-project view
Low overall confidence (50.7%) means findings require manual validation before acting on reported issues
